name: update_order
description: Update an existing child profile/order in the backend database. The user must provide their order ID (starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits). Then ask which fields they want to change — name, age, gender, order type, or interests. Only send the fields that need to change.

request_body_schema.description:
Use this tool to update an existing child profile in the backend database.

The order_id field is always required and must start with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits.
All other fields are optional — only include the fields the user wants to change.

Do not summarize.
Do not send free text.
Send structured JSON exactly matching the defined schema.
Only call the tool once the order_id and at least one field to update are confirmed.

properties.description:
The order ID of the order to update.
It starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits (e.g. OUM12345678).
This field is always required.

The new name for the child.
Only include this field if the user wants to change the name.
Return only the name string.

The new age for the child as a positive integer (1–18).
Only include this field if the user wants to change the age.
Return only the number.

The new gender for the child.
Must be either "boy" or "girl".
Only include this field if the user wants to change the gender.

The new order type.
Must be either "story book" or "movie".
Only include this field if the user wants to change the order type.

The new list of interests or hobbies (max 10).
Only include this field if the user wants to change the interests.
This will replace the entire interests list.

items.description: A single interest or hobby as a short descriptive word or phrase.
